activated_rules.rule_name: General goods description with explicit invoice reference and invoice date
Mixed origins with per-item origin shown in invoice

consignor.certificate_value:
West Food i Göteborg AB
Ringögatan 33
41707, Göteborg
SWEDEN
consignor.invoice_value:
EXPORTER / CONSIGNOR
West Food i Göteborg AB
Ringögatan 33
417 07 Gothenburg
Sweden
consignor.motivation: The certificate consignor "West Food i Göteborg AB" is explicitly identifiable in the invoice on page 1 in the EXPORTER / CONSIGNOR block, and the same company name also appears in the invoice header/branding area. Country matches as Sweden/SWEDEN after allowed country normalization. No contradictory issuer information blocks this match.

consignee.certificate_value:
Ikano Pte Ltd / Ikea Tampines
60 Tampines North Drive 2
SG-528764
Singapore
consignee.invoice_value:
CONSIGNEE
Ikano Pte Ltd / Tampines
IKEA Tampines
60 Tampines North Drive 2
SG-528764
Singapore
consignee.motivation: The invoice consignee block on page 1 contains the same recipient identity: "Ikano Pte Ltd" and "IKEA Tampines" at the same Singapore address. The extra standalone word "Tampines" in the invoice block is treated as place/location text within the address/branch presentation, not as a different legal party. Country matches exactly as Singapore.

goods_description.certificate_value:
As per attached commercial invoice 110545, 110546
Dated 2026-02-27
Food products: Pickled cucumber, Apple mash,
Mineral water,
Sauce, Cookies, Chocolate, Crisps, Snacks and Candy.
goods_description.invoice_value:
INVOICE NO
110545, 110546
INVOICE DATE
2026-02-27
Detailed article list on invoice page 2.
goods_description.motivation: The certificate uses a general goods description together with an explicit invoice reference and invoice date: "As per attached commercial invoice 110545, 110546" and "Dated 2026-02-27." The invoice shows the same invoice number set "110545, 110546" and the same invoice date "2026-02-27" on page 1. Under rule 4.3.5, this is sufficient to verify the goods description without further semantic text comparison.

quantity.invoice_value:
GROSS WEIGHT in kg
8 004,840
NET WEIGHT in kg
7 130,880
quantity.motivation: The certificate quantity field explicitly states both numeric value, unit and weight category: "8 004,840 Kg Gross" and "7 130,880 Kg Net." The invoice on page 1 explicitly states "GROSS WEIGHT in kg 8 004,840" and "NET WEIGHT in kg 7 130,880." Both certificate quantities are directly identifiable in the invoice with exact matching values and matching gross/net categories.

origin.certificate_value:
European Community -
SE, SK, BE, FI, NL, NO
origin.invoice_value: Country of origin column on invoice page 2 contains: SE, BE, FI, NO, NL, SK
origin.motivation: The certificate origin field lists "European Community - SE, SK, BE, FI, NL, NO." The invoice page 2 has an explicit "Country of origin" column with per-line origins including SE, SK, BE, FI, NL and NO. Therefore every specifically named country in the certificate is explicitly present in the invoice. The "European Community" element is also supported by the presence of EU member-state origins in the invoice under the EU normalization rules. Norway (NO) is non-EU, but it is expressly listed in both documents, so there is no contradiction.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: Document classification is clear: Document A is a Certificate of Origin and Document B is a Commercial Invoice. No LC reference triggering the LC exception was found. The mandatory document-pair sanity check is satisfied because the certificate invoice reference (110545, 110546), consignor and consignee are all identifiable in the invoice. All applicable control points are MATCH: consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity and origin. The certificate's general goods description is validly tied to invoice numbers 110545, 110546 dated 2026-02-27, and the mixed origin list in the certificate is explicitly supported by the invoice's per-item country-of-origin column. Since no applicable control point is MISMATCH or MANUAL_REVIEW, the comparison result is IDENTICAL.
